idea-plugin.name: Plot Toggle
idea-plugin.description:
Adds a one-click toolbar toggle to control PyCharm's Show plots in tool window setting (Settings > Tools > Python Plots) without opening the settings dialog.

When working with matplotlib in PyCharm Professional, plots can either appear inline in the console or in a dedicated tool window. Switching between these modes normally requires navigating through the settings dialog. This plugin puts that toggle right in your toolbar.

  • Toggle ON: Plots appear in the PyCharm Plots tool window.
  • Toggle OFF: Plots appear inline in the Python console.

The button appears in the main toolbar (right side) and the Tools menu. It is only visible when the Python Scientific module is available.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release.
  • Toolbar toggle button for the "Show plots in tool window" setting.
  • Available in the main toolbar and Tools menu.

action.description: Toggle the 'Show plots in tool window' setting
